text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O asked me to accompany her to
her dance rehearsal, so I'm joining her today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's begin the dance practice!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I saw it on TV yesterday! Apparently the
parade here is amazing and super famous too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In other words, it's perfect! It's OUTSTANDING!
And as a model student, I intend to learn their
ways!
choice_data_list: I see. So this is for studying purposes.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yikes! Time flies while you're talking! Better hurry
and get ready!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
First, let's go and buy a penlight! It's apparently
part of the formalities to wave them at parades.
How refined!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, they're selling churros and soda over there! I
heard they are also essential items! Let's go and
get some!
choice_data_list: Are we really here to practice?
Are we really here to practice?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! They talked about all these
components on TV after all! They're the secret to
understanding the essence of the parade!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with the preliminary arrangements in
place, the parade finally begins...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Carrot King and Queen have made an
entrance! Oh! Aaah! Oooh?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Such an amazing dance... I've gotten all pumped
without even realizing! This energy! It feels like
my grip could pulverize this penlight!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Such power of expression! To be able to whip up
the crowd into such a frenzy! I need to learn this
too, so I can bask in the applause!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Oh! Over there! It's Carrot King and Que—no,
my masters! My venerable teachers!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is... This is my chance! Should I ask them
directly about the essence of the dance?!
choice_data_list: Practice is more valuable than that!
All right! Let's go and ask.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! Practice over theory! Understood! Let's get
dancing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You know what they say! Strike while the
iron is hot! So let's do it before I can say I forgot!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's like this! Then this! Like this... or this... Is this
right?!

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Amazing! Do your best!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Thank you for all the encouragement! I'll
definitely perform well next time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Woo! Whoa! Woo, woo, whoa, whoa... hoo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's the dance from the parade! It's exactly
the same! Incredible!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Haa-ha ha ha ha! Such wonderful applause! I'll
keep going!

text_block_list.name: Amusement Park Staff
text_block_list.text:
What's all the commotion? ...Wait, a park guest?!
What do you think you're doing?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After causing a disturbance and getting scolded,
Sakura Bakushin O is delighted to hear from her
dance instructor that her dancing has improved
the next day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we get in line for the greeting booth.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: This is it! It's my turn! I'm going to ask the experts!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I loved the parade! Please teach me how to do
that dance!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that heart-shaped hand sign... I see! You put
your heart into your movements from head to toe!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now you're pointing at your head... Oh! In other
words, by building a better understanding of the
choreography, you can then express it with all
your might?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To put it frankly, you're saying it all comes down
to Bakushin! Aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, all roads lead to Bakushin! How could I
forget? Careless, so careless!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I really appreciate the advice from you experts!
I'll work on the basics and master the dance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I wasn't sure about how useful our
excursion would be, Sakura Bakushin O is
delighted when her dance instructor tells her she
improved the next day.
